      map := fun {X Y} =>
        Quotient.recOnSubsingleton₂ (motive := fun x x_1 =>
          (x ⟶ x_1) → (Quotient.map (F ⋙ G).obj ⋯ x ⟶ Quotient.map (F ⋙ G).obj ⋯ x_1)) X Y fun x y k => homOfLE ⋯,

            (x ⟶ x_1) → (Quotient.map F.obj ⋯ x ⟶ Quotient.map F.obj ⋯ x_1)) X Y fun x y k => homOfLE ⋯,
        map_id := ⋯, map_comp := ⋯ } ⋙
      { obj := Quotient.map G.obj ⋯,
        map := fun {X Y} =>

            (x ⟶ x_1) → (Quotient.map G.obj ⋯ x ⟶ Quotient.map G.obj ⋯ x_1)) X Y fun x y k => homOfLE ⋯,
